'''papofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabaigrass|sabaigrass]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabaigrass|sabaigrass]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| papofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæpefeth|pæpefeth]] || [[word:pæpefej|pæpefej]] || [[word:pæpefesh|pæpefesh]] || [[word:pæpefe|pæpefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:papopofoth|papopofoth]] || [[word:papopofoj|papopofoj]] || [[word:papopofosh|papopofosh]] || [[word:papopofo|papopofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:papofoth|papofoth]] || [[word:papofoj|papofoj]] || [[word:papofosh|papofosh]] || [[word:papofo|papofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:papoffoth|papoffoth]] || [[word:papoffoj|papoffoj]] || [[word:papoffosh|papoffosh]] || [[word:papoffof|papoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:papofotho|papofotho]] || [[word:papofojo|papofojo]] || [[word:papofosho|papofosho]] || [[word:papofoko|papofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:papofoth|papofoth]] || [[word:papofoj|papofoj]] || [[word:papofosh|papofosh]] || [[word:papofo|papofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:papofothol|papofothol]] || [[word:papofojol|papofojol]] || [[word:papofoshol|papofoshol]] || [[word:papofokol|papofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:papofothotho|papofothotho]] || [[word:papofojojo|papofojojo]] || [[word:papofoshosho|papofoshosho]] || [[word:papofoko|papofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:papofothon|papofothon]] || [[word:papofojon|papofojon]] || [[word:papofoshon|papofoshon]] || [[word:papofokon|papofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:papofothoro|papofothoro]] || [[word:papofojoro|papofojoro]] || [[word:papofoshoro|papofoshoro]] || [[word:papofokoro|papofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
